items.title: Paul Tudor Jones says bitcoin is ‘unequivocally the best inflation hedge’
items.desc: However, the hedge fund manager did acknowledge concerns surrounding potential cyber warfare and quantum computing risks.

items.title: Andre Cronje says DeFi is ‘no longer DeFi’ as builders debate circuit breakers
items.desc: Flying Tulip’s Andre Cronje says circuit breakers can give teams time to respond during abnormal outflows, while Curve’s Michael Egorov warns they may create new human vulnerabilities.

items.title: Bitcoin holds above $77,000 as ETF outflows extend ahead of what may be Powell’s final FOMC meeting
items.desc: Analysts say bitcoin traders are watching whether the Fed reinforces a higher-for-longer stance after two straight days of ETF outflows.

items.title: XRP set for ‘strongest’ 2026 monthly ETF inflows as bulls target $2
items.desc: XRP price technicals are favoring a potential rebound to $2.15 as long as support at $1.40 is held, and institutional demand remains elevated.

items.title: Prediction market volume tops $25 billion monthly as retail activity dominates, crypto drives onboarding: report
items.desc: Retail dominated as prediction market volume reached $25.7B last month, with crypto accounting for nearly 40% of activity among new users.

items.title: DeFi shaken by $292 million hack, but showing resilience, Standard Chartered says
items.desc: The AAVE-led response and new safeguards underscore the sector's maturity as the bank maintains its $2 trillion RWA outlook.

items.title: GSR says Crypto Core3 ETF is simple gateway for mainstream investors
items.desc: A new actively managed ETF aims to simplify crypto investing by bundling Bitcoin, Ethereum and Solana into one rebalanced portfolio.

items.title: ZetaChain dismissed bug report that could have prevented $334K exploit
items.desc: The vulnerability behind ZetaChain's $334,000 exploit had been reported through its bug bounty program before the attack but was dismissed.

items.title: Galaxy Digital leads $20 million investment in Fence to overhaul back end of $6 trillion credit market
items.desc: Startup Fence uses blockchain technology and tokenization in the background to automate processes that many asset managers still rely on manual workflows.

items.title: MoonPay acquires Israeli crypto security firm Sodot in $100 million stock deal
items.desc: The acquisition gives MoonPay the security infrastructure for a new institutional business led by former CFTC Acting Chair Caroline Pham.

items.title: Bullish Invests 250 BTC in BTCFi Company Mezo
items.desc: The investment, worth over $19M at current prices, coincides with Mezo's launch of Bitcoin yield vaults for institutional clients.

items.title: Stable Sea taps WisdomTree to bring tokenized Treasury access to small and medium-sized businesses
items.desc: “We want to be the default for 'money at rest' within the onchain space,” WisdomTree Head of Digital Assets Will Peck said.

items.title: A tiny group is winning on Polymarket as under 1% of wallets take half the profits
items.desc: After research showed a small minority moves prices, new data suggests an even smaller group captures roughly half of all gains

items.title: Morning Minute: Paul Tudor Jones Calls Bitcoin Strongest Inflation Hedge
items.desc: Crypto majors rebound ahead of FOMC, despite oil surging, while Polymarket is making a push to enter the U.S.

items.title: ‘DeFi bent, not broken’: Standard Chartered says rsETH episode won’t derail path to $2T RWA market
items.desc: The bank said DeFi’s $300 million-plus rescue effort and structural upgrades reinforce its long-term $2 trillion real-world asset thesis.

items.title: Bitcoin trading volume is falling fast. That rarely ends smoothly.
items.desc: What you need to know for April 29, 2026

items.title: Ethereum ICO Whale Who Turned $3,100 Into $23M Wakes Up After a Decade
items.desc: A wallet dormant since 2015 just moved 10,000 ETH—but analysts say a custody restructuring, not a sell, is the likely explanation.

items.title: Tether leads Belo's $14 million raise to expand stablecoin payments across Latin America
items.desc: Belo, which has over 3 million users across Latin America, offers a digital wallet that lets users hold and transfer local currencies alongside digital dollars.

items.title: Ripple, OKX expand RLUSD access with over 280 spot pairs, derivatives use
items.desc: OKX customers can now use RLUSD 'to trade and collateralize positions across both spot and derivatives markets.'

items.title: Dunamu, Hana Financial take blockchain remittance system live with POSCO
items.desc: South Korea's Hana Financial, POSCO International and Upbit operator Dunamu have moved their blockchain remittance system into live trade transactions.

items.title: Bitcoin rebounds from key support as traders eye renewed push toward $80,000
items.desc: BTC climbs after holding at the $75,600 support level while derivatives signal de-risking, and speculative flows build in memecoins ahead of tech earnings.

items.title: First prediction market ETFs could launch next week, Bloomberg analyst says
items.desc: Roundhill’s SEC filing set a May 5 effective date for its prediction market ETFs, which analysts say could pave the way for a launch next week.

items.title: Polymarket pushes for broader US relaunch with CFTC talks: Report
items.desc: Polymarket is reportedly in talks with the CFTC to restore US access after its 2022 settlement, following a limited US rollout in December 2025 focused on sports contracts.

items.title: Mezo unveils institutional bitcoin yield vaults as demand grows to put idle BTC to work
items.desc: A new product from Mezo, backed by Anchorage Digital and seeded by Bullish, highlights a broader shift as institutions seek yield on bitcoin without sacrificing custody or control.

items.title: Celsius founder Alex Mashinsky settles FTC case with $10M payment
items.desc: The FTC order ties Mashinsky’s $10 million payment to a mostly suspended $4.72 billion judgment that can be revived over asset disclosures.

items.title: Fake Hong Kong stablecoins start trading as real ones remain absent
items.desc: Tokens using ‘HKDAP’ and ‘HSBC’ tickers are circulating even as the HKMA says no licensed stablecoins have been issued

items.title: Judge Shoots Down Sam Bankman-Fried's Bid for New Trial
items.desc: The judge dismissed the FTX founder’s claims that potential witnesses faced "government threats and retaliation" as "wildly conspiratorial.”

items.title: ‘This is the future’: Czech central bank governor makes case for bitcoin in sovereign reserves
items.desc: Czech National Bank Governor Ales Michl told Bitcoin 2026 that BTC can improve reserve portfolios without materially increasing risk.

items.title: KuCoin EU hires anti-money laundering talent to appease Austrian regulator
items.desc: KuCoin was ordered by Austria’s FMA to halt business in the EU because of a shortfall in AML and compliance staff.

items.title: There's a social media groundswell predicting bitcoin above $90,000. That might be a problem.
items.desc: The crowd is heavily leaning bullish, and that's often a contrarian signal, according to Santiment.

items.title: Pump.fun has been using all its revenue to burn its token. Now it’s changing course
items.desc: The Solana memecoin launchpad will now split revenue evenly between buybacks and operations, replacing a nine-month policy that funneled every dollar into burning PUMP.

items.title: ZetaChain identifies cross-chain messaging loophole as root of targeted exploit
items.desc: ZetaChain's post-mortem explained that the attacker took advantage of three vulnerabilities to drain $333,868 from team wallets.

items.title: US court sentences Cartier descendant to 8 years in $470 million crypto laundering case
items.desc: A US court sentenced Maximilien de Hoop Cartier to 8 years for operating an unlicensed crypto exchange that laundered more than $470 million.

items.title: Polymarket denies data breach, says hacker is selling public data
items.desc: The apparent hacker claimed to have breached other prediction markets and planned to release the data in the next few days.

items.title: Aptos says its new privacy coin seeks to fix one of crypto’s biggest trade-offs
items.desc: Aptos said its new privacy coin could be used to enable businesses to transact onchain without competitors tracking treasury moves and trading strategies.

items.title: Hong Kong warns of fake tokens posing as HSBC’s stablecoin
items.desc: HSBC and Anchorpoint Financial both clarified that they have not launched any stablecoins in Hong Kong, but plan to do so this year.

items.title: CFTC pulls Wisconsin into fight over prediction market jurisdiction
items.desc: The US Commodity Futures Trading Commission has sued Wisconsin in the agency’s fifth lawsuit against a US state to assert jurisdiction over prediction markets.

items.title: Canada proposes ban on crypto ATMs as fraud cases mount
items.desc: Canada's Liberal government calls machines a “primary method” for scams as data and law enforcement link them to rising losses

items.title: Ethereum ICO whale moves $23 million in ETH after 10-year dormancy
items.desc: The Ethereum whale address received the ETH on July 30, 2015, after participating in the ICO event with $3,100.

items.title: XRP falls to $1.38 after breaking below $1.40 on rising selling pressure
items.desc: High-volume move flips support into resistance, leaving price stuck at a key decision level.

items.title: Bitcoin’s recent rally is largely fueled by Strategy purchases: Bitwise's Hougan
items.desc: While Bitcoin exchange-traded funds and whale buying have contributed to the recent Bitcoin rally, the key driver has been consistent buying by Michael Saylor's treasury firm, Strategy, according to Bitwise's chief investment officer.

items.title: Institutional money is coming for bitcoin, but Adam Back says it moves slower than you think
items.desc: The legendary cryptographer discusses institutional money flows into bitcoin.

items.title: Bitcoin is Reshaping Traditional Finance, Industry Leaders Say
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Bitcoin is Reshaping Traditional Finance, Industry Leaders Say At Bitcoin 2026, a Nakamoto Stage panel made a simple but striking point: Bitcoin’s institutional growth is being driven by competitors who are actually working together, building the tools, products, and infrastructure needed to bring the asset into mainstream finance. This post Bitcoin is Reshaping Traditional Finance, Industry Leaders Say first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Judge rejects new trial for former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried
items.desc: A federal judge slammed Sam Bankman-Fried’s request for a new trial as seemingly “a plan to rescue his reputation,” denying the former FTX boss’s request.

items.title: ‘This Time Is Different’: A First of Its Kind Documentary Covering Bitcoin’s Four Year Cycle, David Bailey, And Nakamoto in Production
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine ‘This Time Is Different’: A First of Its Kind Documentary Covering Bitcoin’s Four Year Cycle, David Bailey, And Nakamoto in Production A new documentary, This Time Is Different, will chronicle Bitcoin’s four-year cycle and David Bailey’s journey building Nakamoto Inc. through its public launch and market swings. This post ‘This Time Is Different’: A First of Its Kind Documentary Covering Bitcoin’s Four Year Cycle, David Bailey, And Nakamoto in Production first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Judge rejects Sam Bankman-Fried’s new trial request, slams claims as ‘wildly conspiratorial’
items.desc: U.S. District Judge Lewis Kaplan declined former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried's request for a new trial. An appeal is still pending.

items.title: Woman Gets 71 Months in Prison Over Bitcoin Investment Fraud Targeting Elderly Victims
items.desc: Federal prosecutors secured a prison term for a Saipan woman who defrauded elderly victims through a fake Bitcoin investment scheme

items.title: Bitcoin 2027 Conference Returning to Nashville, Tennessee
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Bitcoin 2027 Conference Returning to Nashville, Tennessee The Music City is set to host Bitcoin 2027, the world's largest Bitcoin gathering, on July 15–17, 2027 This post Bitcoin 2027 Conference Returning to Nashville, Tennessee first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: CFTC Backs Prediction Markets in Yet Another Lawsuit Against a State
items.desc: CFTC Chair Mike Selig has vowed to sue any state that attempts to regulate prediction markets under its own gambling laws.

items.title: Czech Central Bank Chief Backs Bitcoin as 1% Reserve Slice in ‘Conservative but Innovative’ Strategy
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Czech Central Bank Chief Backs Bitcoin as 1% Reserve Slice in ‘Conservative but Innovative’ Strategy Czech National Bank Governor Aleš Michl used a Bitcoin industry stage in Las Vegas to defend a reserve strategy that mixes strict inflation control with measured exposure to digital assets. This post Czech Central Bank Chief Backs Bitcoin as 1% Reserve Slice in ‘Conservative but Innovative’ Strategy first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: LayerZero commits 10,000 ETH to DeFi United effort
items.desc: Kelp says it used the default configuration for its LayerZero-powered Decentralized Verifier Network that was exploited.

items.title: Bitcoin Holds $76K Ahead of Powell's Final Fed Meeting
items.desc: Crypto markets are trading cautiously, with the Fed widely expected to hold rates steady tomorrow.

items.title: Ostium upgrades backend, adds offchain institutional liquidity providers like Jump
items.desc: Following a major backend overhaul, Ostium pitches itself as a “decentralized execution layer” for global markets.

items.title: RedStone launches settlement layer to address RWA liquidity gap in DeFi lending
items.desc: A new system targets the mismatch between fast DeFi liquidations and slow asset redemptions, a key barrier to the use of tokenized assets in lending markets.

items.title: Lightspark Launches Grid Global Accounts, Targeting Fragmented Global Payment System
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Lightspark Launches Grid Global Accounts, Targeting Fragmented Global Payment System David Marcus, CEO of Lightspark, used a Tuesday morning session at the Bitcoin 2026 Conference to announce Grid Global Accounts. This post Lightspark Launches Grid Global Accounts, Targeting Fragmented Global Payment System first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: DeFi United Outlines Technical Path To Make Kelp's rsETH Whole
items.desc: The coalition has secured ETH commitments to refill the bridge in tranches and will use Aave and Compound governance proposals to liquidate the exploiter's remaining positions.

items.title: Your Bank is Becoming a Casino: River CEO Frames Bitcoin as the Alternative
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Your Bank is Becoming a Casino: River CEO Frames Bitcoin as the Alternative Bitcoin 2026 speaker Alex Leishman warned in his Bitcoin 2026 talk that modern finance is shifting toward a gambling-like system, arguing that rising costs and stagnant wages are pushing people toward prediction markets. This post Your Bank is Becoming a Casino: River CEO Frames Bitcoin as the Alternative first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Soldier Charged in Polymarket Insider Trading Case Pleads Not Guilty
items.desc: Special forces member Gannon Ken Van Dyke allegedly used inside knowledge of a Venezuelan military operation to make nearly $400K profit on Polymarket.

items.title: CFTC sues Wisconsin in agency's legal campaign defending prediction markets authority
items.desc: The U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission added Wisconsin to the list of states it's sued over event-contract jurisdiction, most recently New York.

items.title: Ostium Launches Institutional Hedging Layer
items.desc: The Arbitrum-based RWA perps protocol now routes net directional flow to Jump and prime brokers offchain, retiring the single-pool model that absorbed all trader risk.

items.title: CFTC Sues Wisconsin in Response to State's Lawsuits Against Prediction Markets
items.desc: The CFTC filed suit against Wisconsin to establish its exclusive regulatory authority over prediction markets, a sector closely tied to crypto and blockchain-based derivatives.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.desc: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Aave, Compound Unveil Technical Plan to Address Fallout From $290M Kelp DAO Hack
items.desc: Major DeFi protocols outlined technical steps to eliminate bad debt and restore full backing for exploited rsETH tokens.

items.title: Block (XYZ) Touts Bitcoin as ‘Everyday Money’ With 800,000 Merchants Now Accepting It
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Block (XYZ) Touts Bitcoin as ‘Everyday Money’ With 800,000 Merchants Now Accepting It Block is accelerating its push to make bitcoin everyday money, with Miles Suter unveiling new payments, rewards, and self-custody tools at Bitcoin 2026 alongside proof of $2.2 billion in BTC reserves. This post Block (XYZ) Touts Bitcoin as ‘Everyday Money’ With 800,000 Merchants Now Accepting It first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Canaan, Tether deepen partnership on immersion-cooled mining systems
items.desc: Canaan secures a new Tether order for modular mining hardware as the stablecoin issuer expands into integrated, data center-style Bitcoin infrastructure.

items.title: World Cup fever: Chiliz expands to Solana and Base to supercharge fan token trading
items.desc: Chiliz rolled out its own layer-1 network in 2023 to host the trading of its tokens, but is transitioning to what it calls "omnichain distribution."

items.title: Stablecoin Giant Tether Reveals Plans for Modular Bitcoin Mining Hardware
items.desc: Leading stablecoin issuer Tether has teamed with Canaan and ACME Swisstech to develop customizable, upgradable Bitcoin mining rigs.

items.title: Polymarket Seeks Full CFTC Approval for Its Main Platform: Report
items.desc: The move would let Polymarket's primary, on-chain prediction market platform operate in the United States, rather than through its current intermediated setup with Polymarket US.

items.title: Bitcoin price hits one-week low as $100 oil sparks fresh Asia crisis fears
items.desc: Bitcoin price downside returned to send BTC to one-week lows thanks to renewed concerns over global oil supplies focused on the Strait of Hormuz blockade.

items.title: Blockstream Launches Jade Core to Simplify Bitcoin Self-Custody Without Sacrificing Security
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Blockstream Launches Jade Core to Simplify Bitcoin Self-Custody Without Sacrificing Security Blockstream has launched Jade Core, a simplified, open-source hardware wallet designed to make Bitcoin self-custody more accessible to a broader range of users. This post Blockstream Launches Jade Core to Simplify Bitcoin Self-Custody Without Sacrificing Security first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: BitMart x EAT Trade-to-Feed competition to pay out $4.4m USDT to traders in May 2026
items.desc: The 30-day Trade-to-Feed competition marks BitMart's 8th anniversary and the exchange's strategic listing of EAT, the first cause coin.

items.title: Hyperliquid Gains Counter $216 Million Q1 Loss at Novogratz's Galaxy Digital
items.desc: CEO Mike Novogratz said Galaxy Digital’s balance sheet suffered because crypto prices are down, yet Hyperliquid partially offset losses.

items.title: Amboss Activates RailsX, Enabling Self-Custody Stablecoin Trading on Bitcoin Lightning
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Amboss Activates RailsX, Enabling Self-Custody Stablecoin Trading on Bitcoin Lightning Amboss' RailsX goes live with USDT-L and USDC-L, bringing peer-to-peer, self-custodial stablecoin trading to the Lightning Network for the first time. This post Amboss Activates RailsX, Enabling Self-Custody Stablecoin Trading on Bitcoin Lightning first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: AML crackdown eclipses securities enforcement as crypto’s top regulatory risk: Report
items.desc: US Anti-Money Laundering fines hit $900 million in the first half of 2025 as enforcement shifted from securities cases, while Basel rules and mandatory audits reshape crypto compliance, according to CertiK.

items.title: Can Bitcoin hit $250K this year? Traders say it may be time to ‘sell in May’
items.desc: Veteran trader Peter Brandt and other analysts question the $250,000 Bitcoin target, warning the current bear phase may not be over.

items.title: Crypto projects shut down as token models fail under pressure
items.desc: Crypto projects are shutting down as token funding weakens and fragmented structures leave them with limited options to restructure or recover.

items.title: Japan tells real estate and crypto sectors to tighten AML checks on property deals
items.desc: Four Japanese government agencies have warned against the AML risks posed by crypto in real estate transactions, instructing industry bodies to enforce stricter compliance.

items.title: Stablecoin payroll gets built-in yield with Paxos Labs-Toku integration
items.desc: The integration lets employees earn yield on stablecoin-paid salaries without moving funds or giving up custody.

items.title: Aave-linked DeFi United unveils rsETH recovery plan after $293M Kelp exploit
items.desc: DeFi United published a technical plan to restore rsETH backing and unwind attacker-linked DeFi positions after the $293 million Kelp exploit.

items.title: White House Crypto Adviser Hints at ‘Breakthrough’ Bitcoin Reserve Move
items.desc: A "big announcement" on the U.S. Bitcoin strategic reserve could drop soon, but Treasury and a stalled Senate bill continue to set limits.

items.title: Startale to add Privacy Boost transfers to Sony-linked Soneium app
items.desc: Startale plans to integrate Sunnyside Labs’ Privacy Boost into its Soneium app, adding private transfers with audit-friendly compliance controls.

items.title: Bitcoin's Next Move Hinges on $82K CME Gap as Earnings, FOMC Loom
items.desc: Big Tech earnings and the FOMC are challenging investor risk appetite, with $82K as a make-or-break level for Bitcoin’s recovery rally.

items.title: Morning Minute: Fidelity Is Cautiously Bullish on Crypto
items.desc: Fidelity says crypto may finally be finding its floor, while the White House is teasing a major strategic Bitcoin reserve update.

items.title: Jack Dorsey's Block Discloses $2.2B Bitcoin Holdings in Q1 Proof-of-Reserves Report
items.desc: The fintech company's third-party audited disclosure shows $1.5 billion in customer Bitcoin and $692 million in corporate treasury holdings.

items.title: Aave-Led 'DeFi United' Relief Effort Raises $300 Million to Cover Kelp DAO Exploit Losses
items.desc: The Aave-led relief effort has gained widespread support, securing enough commitments to replenish the swiped funds.

items.title: Bitcoin Developer Plans to 'Reassign' Coins Linked to Satoshi Nakamoto in Hard Fork
items.desc: Paul Sztorc’s proposed eCash fork would give investors coins cloned from wallets believed to belong to Bitcoin creator Satoshi Nakamoto.

items.title: NFTs Attempt Another Comeback as Blue Chips Surge
items.desc: Bored Apes, Mutant Apes, Pudgy Penguins, Azuki and Doodles are all up double digits on the month.

items.title: Sky Proposes to Streamline Treasury Management
items.desc: With Genesis Capital fully deployed, the protocol looks to shift from governance-determined capital outflows to rules-bound expenses capped at a fixed percentage of revenue.

items.title: DeFi United Hits Recovery Target as Consensys, Solana, TRON Pledge Support
items.desc: The DeFi United coalition crossed its rsETH backing target after a flood of weekend commitments from across the Ethereum, Solana, TRON, Avalanche, and Bitcoin ecosystems.

items.title: CFTC Chairman Endorses Prediction Markets as Valuable for Hedging and Information Discovery: Selig
items.desc: CFTC Chairman Rostin Behnam said prediction markets provide measurable value to participants and the public, committing the agency to setting regulatory standards for the sector.

items.title: Bitcoin Core 31.0 released
items.desc: Bitcoin Core version 31.0 is now available for download. See the release notes for more information about the bug fixes in this release. If you have any questions, please stop by the #bitcoin IRC chatroom (IRC, web) and we’ll do our best to help you.

items.title: Bitcoin Core 31.0 released
items.desc: Bitcoin Core version 31.0 is now available for download. See the release notes for more information about the bug fixes in this release. If you have any questions, please stop by the #bitcoin IRC chatroom (IRC, web) and we’ll do our best to help you.
